item.title: WA Labor minister Paul Papalia quits politics to support family member with serious illness
item.description: The veteran MP’s resignation will trigger a cabinet shake-up and by-election.

item.title: Deadly clashes break out at prison in Negombo, Sri Lanka
item.description: The clashes began on Sunday in the Sri Lankan coastal town of Negombo.

item.title: John Longmire among 10 to be contacted as Essendon begin process for next coach
item.description: The Bombers are casting a wide net despite all the talk being around two former players.

item.title: Countdown is on for 2026 Rugby League World Cup
item.description: The blockbuster tournament will be live and free on Seven and 7plus.

item.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes continues to rise as thousands remain displaced
item.description: Almost 18,000 people are still homeless more than a week after twin earthquakes struck the country’s capital and nearby coastal regions.

item.title: Hamas relinquishes control over Gaza Strip in major step towards peace with Israel
item.description: The terror group has ruled the enclave for almost two decades.

item.title: Chocolate queen Kirsten Tibballs shares the ultimate six-layer cake for World Chocolate Day
item.description: Take your World Chocolate Day celebrations to the next level with Kirsten Tibballs’ showstopping six-layer chocolate cake.

item.title: Wallabies playmaker Carter Gordon ruled out of next two Tests
item.description: ‘Devastated for him.’

item.title: Origin of space debris washing ashore on Queensland beach potentially revealed
item.description: ‘The Agency is continuing to engage with international authorities to formally confirm the launch vehicle and launching state.’

item.title: French authorities accused of Princess Diana cover-up as secret file on royal’s death to remain under lock
item.description: French authorities have been accused of ‘covering up’ what really happened to Princess Diana after shocking new details emerged about a secret file connected to her death.

item.title: Respected cricket umpire Trevor Krink mourned in WA and NT following sudden death
item.description: ‘What do you say about the person who was your everything?

item.title: Federal government report reveals which jobs are most at risk of artificial intelligence disruption
item.description: A new report has shown who is safe and who isn’t as the generative tools continue to advance.

item.title: Monaco bombing suspect Anastasiia Berezovska found shot dead near Kyiv, Ukraine
item.description: The global hunt for a woman wanted over a bomb attack that targeted a Ukrainian-born tycoon has ended.

item.title: French court opens door for Marine Le Pen to run in 2027
item.description: A Paris court has upheld Marine Le Pen's conviction but shortened her ban on running for office.

item.title: Prince Harry loses privacy case against UK tabloid publisher
item.description: The Duke of Sussex was one of several high-profile figures who accused the publisher of unlawful practices.

item.title: Shocking footage captures moment of explosion in Damascus as France's Macron visits Syria
item.description: Explosions have rocked the capital as French President Emmanuel Macron met his Syrian counterpart in a landmark visit.

item.title: Evacuation orders in place as New York high-rise on verge of collapse
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said the situation is being assessed ‘minute-by-minute’.

item.title: Hundreds of snakes on the loose as wild weather in China kills 17
item.description: Authorities are using nets and stun guns to catch the snakes.

item.title: Mexican national shot dead by ICE officers during operation in Houston
item.description: ‘This is not an isolated event across the nation.’

item.title: Pauline Hanson, Holly Valance reunite in England as One Nation leader hints at major UK talks
item.description: A reunion with Holly Valance, lunch at Jeremy Clarkson’s pub and a promise of ‘big meetings’ has fuelled intrigue around Pauline Hanson’s UK trip.

item.title: Unfiltered: Matt Denny opens up on ‘brutal pill’ after father’s death
item.description: ‘To walk away from that comp and having dedicated it to him, that was pretty brutal.’

item.title: Former Afghanistan fast bowler Shapoor Zadran loses health battle a day before 39th birthday
item.description: The much-loved star has been fondly remembered for his ‘courage’ and dedication to the game.

item.title: US President Donald Trump says Memorandum of Understanding with Iran ‘is over’
item.description: ‘It’s a waste of time dealing with them.’

item.title: Wegovy weight loss pill could be approved in Australia by Christmas
item.description: Australia’s regulatory body is set to make a decision on the needle-free option.

item.title: Bec Zacharia among ten influencers flown to Bali to undergo rib repositioning surgery
item.description: After weeks of flip-flopping, an Australian reality TV contestant revealed they went under the knife in Bali for a controversial procedure.

item.title: Johnsons of Old Hurst: Child allegedly thrown into croc pen has six surgeries, remains in hospital
item.description: His family released a statement saying the three-year-old had now undergone six surgeries since the horrifying incident.

item.title: US launches new strikes on Iran as Trump declares ceasefire ‘over’
item.description: Iranian cities are burning in retaliation for ‘unjustified aggression’ in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Mystery winner of $40 million Powerball jackpot makes shock decision after finally claiming prize
item.description: The lucky man had no idea he held the winning ticket in his wallet for weeks.

item.title: Shark Tank’s Kevin O’Leary issues blunt data centre warning
item.description: The investor says Australia has a golden opportunity to lure billions.

item.title: AFL trade talk: St Kilda step up interest in Brisbane premiership hero Sam Marshall, big watch on Jake Stringer
item.description: Four recruiters were watching the out-of-favour midfielder dominate in the VFL.

item.title: Sad update as wreckage found in search for lost Pakistani cargo plane
item.description: Five people onboard, including two pilots, remain unaccounted for.

item.title: Toledo, Argentina: Pilot Leandro Andrés Bertazzo jumps out of plane mid-flight, leaves student to land
item.description: A routine flight lesson quickly turned into a nightmare for one student when the pilot did the unthinkable.

item.title: Injury carnage as Wallabies confirm halves overhaul
item.description: Flyhalf Declan Meredith will make his Test debut and fullback Jock Campbell has been benched to act as his unlikely back-up against France in Brisbane.

item.title: US President Donald Trump says he is Iran’s top assassination target as fresh strikes launched
item.description: The US president warned he could be the ‘next’ leader killed during the conflict.

item.title: Dr Chris Webster: The man who helped solve heinous Erin Patterson case admits he is now broke and jobless
item.description: He helped solve one of Australia’s biggest crimes. Now, Dr Chris Webster says he has paid the ultimate price.

item.title: Senator Sarah Henderson defends triple-0 call during Telstra outage
item.description: One minister has slammed the calls as ‘utterly irresponsible’.

item.title: Are Vodafone’s mobile plans still a good deal after they got more expensive?
item.description: Vodafone’s postpaid mobile plans have jumped by $5 per month but it has added something to soften the blow.

item.title: Telstra outage: Police investigating death of elderly South Australian after senator Kerrynne Liddle doubles down on triple‑0 claim
item.description: A senator had earlier been accused of causing unnecessary panic by South Australia’s police minister.

item.title: ‘My heart is broken’: Family and friends pay tribute to beloved singer-songwriter Bonnie Tyler
item.description: The beloved singer had been unwell in recent months after undergoing emergency intestinal surgery.

item.title: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage left fighting a bin can as the populist leader’s election gamble backfires
item.description: Nigel Farage resigned amid allegations over personal financing. This is his by-election opponent.

item.title: Australians living longer but facing growing chronic disease burden
item.description: The nation’s biggest health check-up reveals we’re spending more of those years living with illness.

item.title: Fresh fire rocks Middle East, leaving Iran-US agreement on the brink
item.description: Iran says the US launched new strikes after hitting dozens of targets overnight, as Iranian missiles breach Jordan’s airspace.

item.title: ‘Scared and desperate’: Hanson hits back after Coalition launches scathing attack on One Nation
item.description: Angus Taylor issued a stark warning to Australians in a major speech overnight, describing Hanson’s party as “a column of smoke”, prompting a fiery response from the One Nation leader.

item.title: Cruz Hewitt reveals secret to his rise after blasting into Wimbledon junior semi-finals
item.description: The 17-year-old needed just 53 minutes to destroy a seeded rival and he’s now just one win away from the final.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Telstra CEO apologises for major outage
item.description: ‘We have let our customers and Australians down... I am sorry for the impact that this has had on so many people.’

item.title: Nutritionist Sarah Di Lorenzo: How to prevent muscle loss and hair loss while on Ozempic, Wegovy or Mounjaro
item.description: SARAH DI LORENZO: Weight-loss drugs have led to remarkable results for some, but as a clinical nutritionist watching this unfold, I want to talk about the side effects that aren’t getting enough attention.

item.description: The one-off spectacular will put a struggling franchise in the shop window.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: ‘Profound shock’ as South Africa star Jayden Adams dies just days after playing at World Cup
item.description: The 25-year-old won the hearts of his nation when he bravely played at the World Cup only hours after his grandmother’s death.

item.title: Wimbledon champion Linda Noskova pays emotional tribute to late mum after wild final against Karolina Muchova
item.description: There were tears all over Centre Court after two friends rode a rollercoaster that featured a tennis meltdown and ended with a beautiful memory.

item.title: Damien Hardwick calls out ‘peanut’ fan after latest ‘dangerous’ Adelaide Oval situation for AFL coaches
item.description: The AFL great regretted egging on the mouthy punter who he reckons ‘lives in mum’s basement’.

item.title: Socceroos’ heartbreak story Jordan Bos shares update from hospital bed after undergoing knee surgery
item.description: The 23-year-old’s fate has finally been revealed after he limped out of the World Cup loss to Egypt.

item.title: Ricky Stuart soaks up vindication over Raiders star Ethan Sanders’ critics: ‘D***s don’t know’
item.description: The veteran coach declared ‘I know what I’m doing’ as he tapped into Nathan Cleary’s Origin exploits to defend his own halfback.

item.title: Dacia Striker: A Romanian take on the original Outback formula
item.description: The Dacia Striker is the brand's largest vehicle to-date, and is aiming to score big with buyers who want a wagon with a touch of SUV styling.

item.title: Expert Insights: Q&A with Honda Australia director Robert Thorp
item.description: Honda Australia posted modest growth in a record overall sales month, so why is its director so happy? We sat down with Robert Thorp to find out.

item.title: Norway’s furious protests ignored as cable drama sends England through to World Cup semis
item.description: FIFA officials were forced to issue a statement before the game was even over after the crucial goal was controversially allowed to stand.

item.title: Sunrise reporter Peter Ford reveals ‘surprising’ phone call from Derryn Hinch about his death
item.description: ‘I know this is kind of weird, but this is what he said to me.’

item.title: Aussie UFC veteran Robert Whittaker says ‘Bobby’s still got it’ after bone-crunching first win at light heavyweight
item.description: The former champion’s victim threw in the towel when he ‘immediately reacted like ‘my jaw is broken’’.

item.title: Sleep retailer shares update after $15 million Federal Court penalty for ‘misleading’ ads
item.description: The retailer has published a court-ordered notice following the ruling.

item.title: Switzerland’s Breel Embolo ‘distraught’ after red card for embarrassing dive against Argentina
item.description: ‘This is remarkable. I think there’s going to be a lot of people upset with a decision like this in a game of this magnitude.’

item.title: UFC rocked as injured Conor McGregor forced to quit seconds into comeback fight against Max Holloway
item.description: The hype train crashed after the controversial star attempted a ‘crazy’ move to start the fight.

item.title: Michelle Payne shares baby joy in surprise pregnancy announcement
item.description: The 40-year-old shared the ‘little love’ news in a surprise social media post.

item.title: Powerful scenes as world record broken for Jai Arrow ahead of South Sydney’s clash with Newcastle
item.description: The NRL community has rallied around the former South Sydney star, who is battling motor neurone disease.

item.title: US senator Lindsey ‌Graham dies aged 71
item.description: The one-time critic turned ally of Donald Trump died after a brief and sudden illness.

item.title: Collingwood champion Scott Pendlebury addresses AFL future: ‘I haven’t thought about it’
item.description: The Magpies legend surprised everyone with an unexpected answer as he approaches the end of his 21st season.

item.title: Brodie Kostecki dodges early chaos to blitz Supercars victory at Townsville 500
item.description: The DJR star came from behind pole to atone for his frustrations earlier in the weekend.

item.title: Jewish family’s Adelaide home targeted in suspected hate crime as police hunt two suspects
item.description: Police are treating the incident as a hate crime.

item.title: Lani Pallister, Kai Taylor walking in famous mothers’ footsteps chasing Glasgow Commonwealth Games glory
item.description: ‘Why not chase the dream and compete in front of your whole country.’

item.title: Scans confirm high-grade syndesmosis injury to Zak Butters as Port career appears over
item.description: The superstar’s decorated eight years at the Power may have come to a sad end.

item.title: Layla Jeffery: Donald community holds vigil for slain teen as accused refuses testing
item.description: The 16-year-old accused of killing Layla Jeffery refused a key police request.

item.title: Manhunt underway after three teens stabbed at party by gatecrashers in Austral, southwest Sydney
item.description: Police were forced to use pepper spray to subdue the 70 revellers.

item.title: Body of missing Brisbane mother Jana Armstrong found, ex-partner charged with murder
item.description: The family of Jana Armstrong were already reeling from a devastating tragedy.

item.title: Max Gawn pays tribute to late hero Jim Stynes in emotional interview after Demons’ victory
item.description: The Melbourne captain admitted Sunday’s win over Richmond was particularly special to him.

item.title: Vietnam veteran's long-lost daughter discovered after almost 60 years
item.description: ‘Through me, and through my children, he has left a legacy.’

item.title: Massive T-rex skeleton set to become most expensive fossil ever sold
item.description: The estimated price is comparable to the king of the dinosaurs’ age.

item.title: Scarlett or Ally: Who will Dylan choose on Farmer Wants A Wife?
item.description: Inside the fallout from the explosive black-tie dinner as the Farmer Wants A Wife finales begin.

item.title: NSW Police searching for Corum Ash after alleged random attack on Sydney pensioner
item.description: A 74-year-old man is fighting for his life after an alleged attack during his morning walk.

item.title: Scott Drinkwater the hero as North Queensland win golden-point epic over Manly
item.description: ‘We did it the hard way and showed a fair bit of fight and ticker.’

item.title: Gruesome image shows extent of Rabbitohs star’s sickening injury as Souths celebrate Jai Arrow’s birthday in style
item.description: A graphic photo has revealed a gaping cut that stretches about a foot down the leg of Dayne Jennings.

item.title: Perth grandfather Lyle Lambie loses $300,000 and home to devastating romance scam
item.description: The 80-year-old is speaking out to save others from the same heartbreak.

item.title: Australia urged to invest as experts warn world unprepared for next pandemic
item.description: ‘No country can say confidently that we are prepared.’

item.title: Bombshell as Brendon McCullum sacked as England Test coach
item.description: The Bazball era appears all but over with the coach following Ben Stokes out the door.
